=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (6:15-6:25) TS377067: This Effect code uses `Date.now()`, time access in Effect code is represented through `Clock` from Effect. effect(globalDateInEffect)
  Fix 0: "Disable globalDateInEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalDateInEffect for entire file"

[D2] (12:15-12:25) TS377069: This Effect code constructs `new Date()`, date values in Effect code are represented through `DateTime` from Effect. effect(globalDateInEffect)
  Fix 0: "Disable globalDateInEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalDateInEffect for entire file"

[D3] (18:16-18:38) TS377069: This Effect code constructs `new Date()`, date values in Effect code are represented through `DateTime` from Effect. effect(globalDateInEffect)
  Fix 0: "Disable globalDateInEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalDateInEffect for entire file"

[D4] (25:15-25:27) TS377067: This Effect code uses `Date.now()`, time access in Effect code is represented through `Clock` from Effect. effect(globalDateInEffect)
  Fix 0: "Disable globalDateInEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalDateInEffect for entire file"

  (no quick fixes)

  (no quick fixes)
